prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约 16706→15751→12626→10962→15727，2023–2024 年位次明显前移（竞争加剧），2025 年因专业组细分（兴海领军班等高分段单独列组）导致校线位次后移至 15727，整体呈波动上升趋势；该校在河南省物理类招生计划：2021 年 222 人、2022 年 225 人、2023 年 198 人、2024 年 154 人、2025 年 169 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 258 人，较 2025 年增加约 52.7%，扩招幅度显著，将缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021 年第 50 名→2024 年第 45 名→2025/2026 年第 43 名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2026 年声誉评价数据中该校未出现明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第 27（较热），综合热度约 172 万，主要传播内容为"国防七子""水声工程王牌专业"等正面标签，报考关注度较高。历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；控制科学与工程（第五轮学科评估 A 级），船舶与海洋工程、水声工程等特色学科全国领先；招生专业中自动化类、计算机类、电子信息类、海洋工程类等均与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐；河南省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 120 万（较 2025 年约 90.7 万增约 32%），物理类考生估算约 73.4 万，考生规模大幅增长将加剧优质高校竞争。；哈尔滨工程大学位于黑龙江省，属东北地区；该校在河南省招生占比约 4%–7%（2025 年物理类 169 人占全国总招生比例未直接给出，但河南为该校重要生源省份），跨省报考地域偏好中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 15727、2026 年大幅扩招约 52.7%（缓解竞争）、软科排名持续上升及国防七子正面声誉（加剧竞争）、河南省考生规模大幅增长约 32%（加剧竞争）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增长效应部分对冲，但学校层次提升与专业热度走高使整体竞争仍趋激烈。预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 20897 名，区间 20397–21397 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 16706→15751→12626→10962→15727. Rankings moved significantly forward from 2023 to 2024 (increased competition). In 2025, due to the subdivision of major groups (e.g., Xinghai Leading Class with high-score segments listed separately), the school's admission ranking shifted back to 15727, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for Physics Category: 222 students in 2021, 225 in 2022, 198 in 2023, 154 in 2024, and 169 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 258 students, an increase of approximately 52.7% compared to 2025, which will alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising: 50th in 2021→45th in 2024→43rd in 2025/2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2026 reputation evaluation data, no significant negative incidents were observed for this university. Douyin popularity ranking: 27th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of approximately 1.72 million. The main content spread includes positive labels such as "Seven Sons of National Defense" and "Top Major in Underwater Acoustics Engineering," indicating high application attention. No signs of admission gaps were found in historical abnormal admission records. Control Science and Engineering (A-level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), and distinctive disciplines such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering and Underwater Acoustics Engineering are nationally leading. The enrollment majors, including Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Ocean Engineering, are highly matched with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category candidates. The significant growth in the number of candidates will intensify competition for high-quality universities. Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region. The proportion of enrollment from Henan Province is about 4%–7% (the specific proportion of 169 Physics Category students in 2025 out of the total national enrollment is not directly given, but Henan is an important source province for this university). Cross-province application regional preference is neutral to slightly positive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 15727, the significant enrollment expansion of approximately 52.7% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings and the positive reputation of the Seven Sons of National Defense (intensifying competition), and the substantial growth of about 32% in the number of candidates in Henan Province (intensifying competition), the expansion effect and the candidate growth effect partially offset each other. However, the improvement in school level and the increasing popularity of majors still make overall competition intense. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 20897, with a range of 20397–21397.

Tier 1 Xinghai Leading Class/Qian Xuesen Class can be used as a sprint (requires rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range). Tier 3 majors (Applied Physics, Materials Class) serve as safety options. If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (around 20397), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 4834→4713→4335→5468→5311. Rankings slightly moved forward from 2021 to 2023, significantly shifted backward to 5468 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 5311 in 2025, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for History Category: 26 students in 2021, 19 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 42 in 2025. In 2026, the plan slightly reduces to 39 students, a decrease of about 7.1% compared to 2025, with a limited reduction magnitude.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science ranking continuously rises to 43rd, with enhanced comprehensive strength, also having brand appeal for liberal arts candidates. In 2026 reputation evaluation, no significant negative events occurred for this university. Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 27th), the label of National Defense Seven Sons increases overall attention, but has limited direct impact on liberal arts major applications. This university is mainly engineering-oriented, with liberal arts majors (Law, Sociology, English, Business Administration) having no A-level discipline evaluation data, but still possessing certain competitiveness relying on the 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is recommended but with clear differentiation, foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, with History Category candidates estimated at about 466,000 (an increase of about 32% from about 352,000 in 2025). The significant growth in candidate numbers will intensify competition for high-quality liberal arts universities. Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang, belonging to the Northeast region. This university's enrollment proportion in Henan for liberal arts is not high (about 42 students per year), with neutral cross-province application regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5311, a slight enrollment reduction of about 7.1% in 2026 (intensifying competition), a significant increase of about 32% in History Category candidate numbers in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and the overall ranking rise of the university (positive impact), competitive pressure increases. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 5233, with a range of 4733–5733.

Candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range (around 4733) can focus on sprinting for the Law major.
